tooltip_final_food_price: Final Food Price = Food Price + Additional Price
in_total_days_order_is_valid: In total days order is valid
please_select_food_in_valid_time: Please select food which is available for selected time
additional_extra_charge_tooltip: If enabledcustomers need to pay an extra charge while checking out orders.
drag_outlet_location: Drag Red Icon Marker to Your Outlet Location
complaint_type_tooltip: Choose different Customers for different Complaint Reasons such as OrderRestaurantDeliverymanand Admin
give_tip_on_checkout_tooltip: Customers can give tips to deliverymen during checkout from the Customer App & Website. Admin will not earn any commission from it.
deliveryman_cash_hold: Enter the maximum cash amount restaurants can hold. If this number exceedsrestaurants will be suspended and not receive any orders.
additional_charge_name_tooltip: Set a name for the additional chargee.g. “Processing Fee”.
additional_charge_amount_tooltip: Set the value (amount) customers need to pay as additional charge.
tax_enabled_tooltip: If enabledthe customer will see the total food priceincluding VAT/TAX. If it’s disabledthe VAT/TAX will be calculated separately from the total cost of the foodand he can see a separate VAT/TAX amount on the invoice
otp_length_on_verification: OTP Length to send while verification!
tiffin_subscription_cancel_reason_toolti: Choose different Role for different Tiffin Subscription Cancellation Reasons such as Customer and Restaurant
rating_message_type: Choose different Role for different Order Ratings Messages such as Restaurant Deliveryman Products Waiter
dining_cancel_reason_tooltip: Choose different Role for different Dining Cancellation Reasonssuch as Customer and Restaurant
most_tipped_gratitude: If customer can see most tipped label while giving gratitude
order_cancel_reason_tooltip: Choose different Role for different Order Cancellation Reasons such as Customer Restaurant Deliverymanand Admin
charge_on_delivery: This charges will count on delivery charges
min_coverage_tooltip: Minimum distance for vehicle, this category to serve the nearest order
max_coverage_tooltip: Maximum distance for vehicle, this category to serve the nearest order
can_cancel_booking: If enabled restaurant can cancel table booking request
can_add_offer: If enabled restaurant can add coupon offers
pre_booking_charge_required_tooltip: If enabled customer have to pay minimum amount of charge as confirmation
guest_booking: If enabled Guest User Can Book Table
google_signin_tooltip: If enabled customer, vendor and driver can sign in with google
apple_signin_tooltip: If enabled customer, vendor and driver can sign in with apple
facebook_signin_tooltip: If enabled customer, vendor and driver can sign in with facebook
order_init_chat: If enabled Restaurant Can Initiat Chat From Order Details
order_init_call: If enabled Restaurant Can Initiat Call From Order Details
user_android_tooltip: The minimum user app version required for the app functionality
user_ios_tooltip: Users will download the latest user app version using this URL
vendor_android_tooltip: The minimum vendor app version required for the app functionality
vendor_ios_tooltip: Users will download the latest vendor app version using this URL
vendor_ios_app_tooltip: Vendors will download the latest vendor app version using this URL
deliveryman_android_tooltip: The minimum Driver app version required for the app functionality
deliveryman_android_app_tooltip: Driver will download the latest Driver app version using this URL
restaurant_self_register: If enabled restaurant can register their self from Web & from App.
restaurant_auto_suspend_cash_in_hand: If enabledrestaurants will be automatically suspended by the system when their ‘Cash in Hand’ limit is exceeded.
restaurant_manual_assign_order: If enabled Restaurant Can Assign Order to Deliveryman manually
restaurant_package_charge: If enabled restaurants will be receive order packages charges, and customer can see the package price.
package_charge_tax_amount_tooltip: If enabled customer can see the package price with tax.
waiter_force_version_tooltip: The minimum Waiter app version required for the app functionality
waiter_android_tooltip: Waiter will download the latest Waiter app version using this URL
kitchen_force_version_tooltip: The minimum Kitchen app version required for the app functionality
kitchen_android_tooltip: Kitchen will download the latest Kitchen app version using this URL
popular_food_tooltip: If enabled Popular Foods will be available on the User App
most_reviewed_foods_tooltip: If enabled the Most Reviewed Foods will be available on the User App.
today_trending_food_tooltip: If enabled the Today's Order Food will be available on the User App.
popular_restaurant_tooltip: If enabled the Popular Restaurants section will be available on the User App
new_restaurant_tooltip: If enabled the New Restaurants will be available on the User App.
tiffin_packages_tooltip: If enabled the Subscription / Tiffin Packages be available on the User App.
popular_dining_restaurant_tooltip: If enabled the Popular Dining Restaurant be available on the User App.
new_dining_restaurant_tooltip: If enabled the New Dining Restaurant be available on the User App.
food_name_tooltip: Set a name for the food tax namee.g. GST Charge.
food_tax_amount_tooltip: Set the value (amount) customer will see the total food priceincluding VAT/TAX
food_tax_type_tooltip: the customer will see the total food price including VAT/TAX based on either percentage or in fixed amount
free_delivery_on_amount_tooltip: Set a minimum order value for free delivery. If someone’s order value reaches this pointhe will get a free deliveryand the delivery fee will be deducted from Admin’s commission and added to the Admin’s expense
min_order_amount_checkout_tooltip: Set Minimum Order Amount For Checkout
free_delivery_distance_tooltip: Within this distance the delivery fee will be free and the delivery fee will be deducted from the admin’s commission.
calculate_delivery_charge_method_tooltip: Calculate delivery charges based on the distance between the pickup location and the delivery location.or fixed amount
calculate_distance_fixed_charge_tooltip: Calculate delivery charges amount based on distance or fixed
food_filter_tooltip: If enabledcustomers can filter food according to their preference from the User App or Website.
commission_based_business_tooltip: If enabledthe commission based business model option will be available for restaurants.
subscription_based_business_tooltip: If enabledthe package based subscription business model option will be available for restaurants
resend_otp_tooltip: If enabled user can see resend otp button while verification
maintenance_mode_tooltip: By turning the ‘Maintenance Mode’ ON all your apps and customer website will be disabled temporarily. Only the Admin Panel Admin Landing Page & Restaurant Panel will be functional.
include_tax_tooltip: If enabledthe customer will see the total food priceincluding VAT/TAX. If it’s disabledthe VAT/TAX will be calculated separately from the total cost of the foodand he can see a separate VAT/TAX amount on the invoice
order_update_admin_tooltip: Admin will get a pop-up notification with sounds for every order placed by customers
guest_checkout_tooltip: If enabledcustomers do not have to login while checking out orders.
refund_request_reason_tooltip: Customers cannot request a Refund if the Admin does not specify a cause for Refund. So Admin MUST provide a proper Refund Reason.
disbursement_request_type_tooltip: Choose Manual or Automated Disbursement Requests. In Automated modewithdrawal requests for disbursement are generated automaticallyin Manual moderestaurants need to request withdrawals manually.
disbursement_generate_tooltip: Choose how the disbursement request will be generated: MonthlyWeekly or Daily.
disbursement_generate_day_tooltip: Choose when the week starts for the new disbursement request. This section will only appear when weekly disbursement is selected.
disbursement_time_tooltip: Define when the new disbursement request will be generated automatically.
disbursement_min_amount_tooltip: Enter the minimum amount to be eligible for generating an auto-disbursement request.
disbursement_complete_day_tooltip: Enter the number of days in which the disbursement will be completed.
can_add_wallet_fund_tooltip: With this featurecustomers can add fund to wallet if the payment module is available.
refund_to_wallet_tooltip: If enabledCustomers will automatically receive the refunded amount in their wallets. But if it’s disabledthe Admin will handle the Refund Request in his convenient transaction channel.
can_buy_from_wallet_tooltip: If enabled customers can earn and buy from their wallets.
customer_register_verification_tooltip: If you activate this featurecustomers need to verify their account information via OTP during the signup process
can_earn_loyalty_points: If enabledcustomers will earn a certain amount of points after each order delivered
loyalty_point_in_order: Loyalty Point Earn Per Order In (%)
min_loyalty_point_for_redeem: Minimum Loyalty Points Required to Redeem
loyalty_point_value_tooltip: 1 Loyalty Points to Total Cash Amount Ex.10/Points to 1$ in Wallet
customer_can_buy_earn_referral: If enabledcustomers will earn a certain amount of points after each order delivered and buy from referral
who_will_earn_referral_tooltip: Who will receive the referral amount on redeem
deliveryman_self_register_tooltip: If enabled deliveryman can register their self from Web & from App.
deliveryman_suspend_cash_in_hand_overflo: If enabled deliveryman will be automatically suspended by the system when their ‘Cash in Hand’ limit is exceeded.
can_see_earning_tooltip: With this feature deliverymen can see their earnings on a specific order while accepting it.
max_order_assign_tooltip: Set the maximum order limit a deliveryman can take at a time (-1) stands for unlimited
pickup_proof_tooltip: If enabled deliverymen will see an option to take pictures of the pickup products from restaurant
dropup_proof_tooltip: If enabled  deliverymen will see an option to take pictures of the delivered products when he swipes the delivery confirmation slide.
deliveryman_incentive_tooltip: If enabled Deliveryman can earn extra money with incentive
delivery_verification_tooltip: When a deliveryman arrives for delivery  Customers will get a verification code on the order details section in the Customer App and needs to provide the code to the delivery man to verify the order delivery
home_delivery_tooltip: If enabled  customers can choose Home Delivery option from the customer app and website
takeaway_tooltip: If enabled  customers can use the Takeaway feature during checkout from the Customer App or Website
repeate_order_tooltip: If enabled  customers can re-order foods from their previous orders.
tiffin_subscription_tooltip: If enabled customer can place orders on a subscription-based. like tiffin-services
include_service_charge_tooltip: If enabled customer need to pay charges like service charges, food tax, packages charges and other valueble charges
order_confirmation_tooltip: The chosen confirmation model will confirm the order first. For example  if the deliveryman confirmation model is enabled  deliverymen will receive and confirm orders before restaurants. After that  restaurants will get orders and process them.
restaurant_can_cancel_order_tooltip: If yes  restaurants can cancel orders.
deliveryman_can_cancel_order_tooltip: If yes  deliveryman can cancel orders.
time_interval_schedule_order_tooltip: By activating this feature  customers can choose their suitable delivery slot according to a 30-minute or 1-hour interval set by the Admin
user_can_cancel_tiffin_subscription_pack: If enabled customer can cancel subscription package
restaurant_can_cancel_tiffin_subscriptio: If enabled restaurant can cancel subscription package
schedule_order_tooltip: With this feature  customers can choose their preferred delivery time and calendar selection.
rating_style_tooltip: With this feature customers can see rating style
instant_order_tooltip: With this feature  customers can order instantly.
schedule_order_given_time_tooltip: With this feature  customers can not select schedule date over the given days.
schedule_order_given_day_tooltip: Customers can not select schedule date over this given days
max_amount_to_hold: Maximum Amount To Hold Cash In Hand ($)
customer_can_earn_and_buy_from_referral: Customer Can Earn & Buy From Referral
customer_can_earn_and_buy_from_wallet: Customer Can Earn & Buy From Wallet
customer_can_add_fund_to_wallet: Customer Can Add Fund To Wallet

import_instruction_one: Download the template file and enter your data accordingly.
import_instruction_two: Refer to the sample file to understand the correct data structure.
import_instruction_three: Ensure you upload a file in Excel or CSV format.
import_instruction_four: Enter your data following the specified format.
import_instruction_five: Make sure the data matches the required format and validation rules.
import_instruction_six: Upload your file in either .xlsx or .csv format.
import_instruction_seven: Click the upload button to complete the process.
import_instruction_eight: For images upload them to the 'public' folder to the api backend and copy the image path for use.
import_instruction_nine: Password will be generated automatically for each user during import.
import_instruction_ten: Make sure your uploaded XLSX or CSV file is free from any hyperlinks.
import_instruction_eleven: Please read carefully before importing any file into the system. Improper data can cause system errors or even server crashes.
import_instruction_excel: Ensure your Excel file follows the structure of the template above.
import_instruction_csv: Ensure your CSV file follows the structure of the template above.

commission_system_sub_title: Pay a small percentage for each order placed through our platform. This model requires no upfront costs, making it perfect for restaurants looking to grow gradually. Only pay when you earn!
subscription_system_sub_title: Choose a flat monthly or yearly fee for unlimited orders. This model is ideal for high-volume restaurants seeking predictable expenses and full control over their profits.
